subtitle.text: You have been watching the Sculk since Ch01. The Warden has been watching you since the first shrieker.

description: CH.08 · THE WARDEN
▸ The Ch01 Sculk Warning told you not to fight the Warden.
This is Ch08.
You're ready now.
Or you're not. There's only one way to find out.
◈ WARDEN COMBAT REFERENCE
└ ▲ Highest HP of any non-boss mob
└ Sonic Shriek: AoE damage through armor
(armor penetrating — numbers don't help)
└ Melee: extremely high damage, knockback
└ Detection: vibration + darkness sense
Sneak everywhere in the fight area
└ Wool + Carpet: place to reduce vibration footprint
during setup before summoning
◈ FIGHT STRATEGY
└ Approach: never sprint — sneak always
└ Trigger: let Warden emerge from ground
└ Hit and run: strike + retreat 20+ blocks
(out of Sonic Shriek range)
└ Bow/Crossbow: safest ranged approach
└ Potion: Strength II if meleeing — reduce fight time
└ Escape: have a prepared exit path
(Warden can follow you up ladders — surprising)
◈ DROP: SCULK WARNING SCROLL
└ 40% drop chance from Warden
└ Covers: full Sculk Sickness cure path,
Ambrosia recipe, Vile Herb mitigation
└ Research time: 20 min
└ Required for late-game Deep Dark farm setup
▸ The Warden was not born here.
The Ancient City had people in it once.
The Warden was made to keep something else out.
The scroll does not say what.
▶ Defeat the Warden [check]
▶ Retrieve the Sculk Warning scroll [check]
◇ The Warden is farmable with patient setup.
Wool floors, sneak lanes, prepared bows.
At that scale, the 40% scroll rate becomes reliable.
